scripts.android: cd android && NODE_ENV=development ./gradlew app:installDebug --quiet --warning-mode none --no-configure-on-demand --no-problems-report && cd .. && EXPO_UNSTABLE_HEADLESS=1 expo start --dev-client --android --port 8081
scripts.android:warnings: cd android && NODE_ENV=development ./gradlew app:assembleDebug --warning-mode all --no-configure-on-demand --no-problems-report --console plain
